name: paperless-ngx
title: Paperless-ngx
description: Self-hosted document management system: scan, index, and archive your documents

defaultEnv.description: Unique random string used to sign sessions and tokens. Generate one, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`.
Username for the fallback local superuser created on first start. Used for emergency/local login when SSO is unavailable.
Password for the fallback superuser. Leave blank to skip auto-creation and instead run `createsuperuser` later (see README).
